## ExtractGetters type

Util type for extracting the getter type of a module.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type ExtractGetters<Module extends XModuleName> = XModulesTree[Module] extends XModule<XStoreModule<any, infer Getter, any, any>> ? Getter : never;
```
